sourceNotes: Antiparos final low/no-source batch 2026-05-27: Antiparos.com, AllOverGreece, GetGreece and Meravigliose Isole Greche source-back Faneromeni at the southern end of Antiparos by the Panagia Faneromeni chapel, with sandy/rocky terrain, difficult dirt-road access from Soros/Sostis, secluded character, and no organized-service evidence.
